steps.title: Use list evaluation
steps.content: All four choices use $x=2$, $x=3$, and $x=4$, so evaluate the function at those three inputs.

steps.title: Read the output row
steps.content: Evaluate the three inputs in order. The output row is $[-1,4,11]$: $$h(2)=-1,\quad h(3)=4,\quad h(4)=11$$

steps.title: Match the table
steps.content: The table with output row $-1,4,11$ is choice B, the correct table.
